adjusted.reasoning: Anchored to the market (USA -165 / draw +340 / AUS +410 -> de-vig ~59/22/19), which firmed toward the USA from the -135 pre-fill after a statement opener: the USA swarmed Paraguay 4-1 (their biggest WC margin) and Pochettino has a full, in-form attack (Pulisic confirmed fit, Balogun, McKennie, Reyna, Tillman) at home in Seattle. adjusted.reasoning: Anchored to the market (Morocco -130 / draw +272 / Scotland +320 -> de-vig ~53/25/22), with the draw nudged up slightly. Morocco are the form side -- unbeaten in 30 and fresh off an impressive 1-1 with Brazil -- and are clear favourites. But Scotland sit top of Group C after beating Haiti 1-0, are defensively organised and need only a point to be in a commanding position, which argues for a tight, low-scoring game and a live draw. A 1-1 draw is the central case, with Morocco the most likely winner if it breaks.
